Registry / Terms / control instrument

control instrument

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00570 · 11 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 10 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01319
T.1.5
weighing instrument used to determine the conventional true value of the mass of the test loads during material tests
pending
20102006OIML R 51-1:2006
#00570
T.1.7
- - Weighing instrument used to determine the conventional true value of the mass of the test load(s). Control instruments used for testing may be: separate from the instrument being tested; or integral, when a static weighing mode is provided by the instrument being tested
pending
20102004OIML R 61-1:2004
#00761
T.1.9
• • weighing instrument used to determine the mass of the test fill(s) delivered by the filling instrument. The control instrument used during testing may be: Separate from the instrument being tested; or Integral, when the instrument being tested is used as the control instrument
pending

#01788
T.1.5
weighing instrument used to determine the mass of a reference vehicle
pending

#01258
T.1.5
a non-automatic weighing instrument used to determine the mass ofa reference wagon

0.1.11
weighing instrument used to determine the mass of a reference wagon by static weighing
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01319
T.1.5
weighing instrument used to determine the conventional true value of the mass of the test loads during material tests
pending
202X2006OIML R134:2006
#02948
T.1.4
weighing instrument used to determine the static reference vehicle mass of the reference vehicles and the static single-axle loads of a two-axle rigid reference vehicle. The control instruments used as a reference instrument during testing may be: - separate from the instrument being tested; or - integral, when a static weighing mode is provided by the instrument being tested.
pending
